description.en: Local control for Wi-Fi Dyson purifiers, fans, heaters and humidifiers. One-time cloud sign-in retrieves the device's local MQTT password, after which everything runs entirely on your LAN — no cloud calls during use. Push-driven state, instant response. Supports TP04/07/09, HP04/07/09, PH01-04, DP04, BP02-04.

value.en:
EITHER fill the EMAIL + PASSWORD + REGION fields (we'll send an OTP and fetch local creds for you — one time only)

OR fill the SERIAL + LOCAL CREDENTIAL + PRODUCT TYPE fields directly if you already have them (skips cloud entirely — best for re-installs).

label.en: — optional network override (applies to BOTH paths) —

value.en:
Fill this if mDNS doesn't work for one or more of your fans (e.g. on a different VLAN, mesh-router AP isolation).

ONE FAN: paste a plain IP, e.g. 192.168.1.42 — applied to every device fetched.

MULTIPLE FANS: paste SERIAL=IP pairs separated by commas, e.g.
  AAA-XX-ZZZ0000A=192.168.1.42, BBB-YY-WWW1111B=192.168.5.10

Each fan that needs an override must have its own correct IP. Devices not listed fall back to mDNS as normal — leave reachable fans out of the mapping.

Tip: reserve a static DHCP lease in your router for each fan you list here so the IP stays constant.

label.en: — or — paste local credentials directly (skip cloud step)

value.en: Fill these instead of email/password to skip the OTP flow. Best for re-installs once you've saved the credentials from a previous setup.
